title: Validate regex and comparators at compile time, not eval time
description: validate_script() walks the entire form tree at compile() time to reject invalid regex patterns and unknown comparators early. A contributor might suggest removing this walk for simplicity and letting errors surface at eval time. This must be resisted: compile() is the explicit contract point for validation. Silent eval-time failures on invalid patterns would be extremely hard for users to debug — the message might never match the failing pattern.
